assignments.name: Assign_closed_to_Similarweb_Forecasting_status
assignments.label: Assign closed to Similarweb Forecasting status

assignments.name: assign_forecast_category_from_SW_forecast
assignments.label: assign forecast category from SW forecast

assignments.name: Assign_Omitted_to_Similarweb_Forecasting_status
assignments.label: Assign Omitted to Similarweb Forecasting status

assignments.name: Assign_Primary_Champion_from_the_recent_Opp
assignments.label: Assign Primary & Champion from the recent Opp

assignments.name: Assign_SW_Forecasting_Status_First_Value
assignments.label: Assign SW Forecasting Status - First Value

assignments.name: Assign_to_Forecasting_status_the_Similarweb_Forecasting_status_value
assignments.label: Assign to Forecasting status the Similarweb Forecasting status value

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Assign_Primary_Champion_from_the_recent_Opp
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Assign Primary & Champion from the recent Opp

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Assign_to_Forecasting_status_the_Similarweb_Forecasting_status_value
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Assign to Forecasting status the Similarweb Forecasting status value

assignments.name: Renewal_Assign_closed_to_Similarweb_Forecasting_status_and_category
assignments.label: Renewal Assign closed to Similarweb Forecasting status and category

assignments.name: Renewal_Assign_omitted_to_Similarweb_Forecasting_status_and_category
assignments.label: Renewal Assign omitted to Similarweb Forecasting status and category

assignments.name: Renewal_Forecasting_Status_to_Reopen_Opp

decisions.description: MIS-2433 - update the default forecast category based on the similarweb Forecast
decisions.name: Forecast_status
decisions.label: Forecast status

rules.name: Yes_there_is_a_PO_number
rules.label: Yes there is a PO number

decisions.description: If cycle price is changed for Cycle = Annually and Rank Ranger opportunity = populate RR ARR
decisions.name: Rule_CARR_Cycle_price_is_changed_for_Annually_cycle
decisions.label: *Rule(CARR)* - Cycle price is changed for Annually cycle

rules.name: Cycle_is_Annually_and_Currency_is_USD
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 3 AND 4 AND (2 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7) AND 8
rules.label: Cycle is Annually and Currency is USD

rules.name: Cycle_is_Annually_and_Currency_is_NOT_USD
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 3 AND 4 AND (2 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7) AND 8
rules.label: Cycle is Annually and Currency is NOT USD

decisions.description: If cycle price is changed for Rank Ranger opportunity = changed MRR
decisions.name: Rule_CPC_Cycle_price_is_changed_for_Monthly_Cycle
decisions.label: *Rule(CPC)* - Cycle price is changed for Monthly Cycle

rules.name: Cycle_price_is_changed_AND_Currency_USD
rules.label: Cycle price is changed AND Currency = USD

rules.name: Cycle_price_is_changed_AND_Currency_not_equal_USD
rules.label: Cycle price is changed AND Currency <> USD

rules.name: Clear_Quote_Not_Submitted_Timestamp
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND (3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10 OR 11) AND (12 OR 13 OR 14 OR 15 OR 16 OR 17 OR 18 OR 19 OR 20)
rules.label: Clear Quote Not Submitted Timestamp

decisions.description: Check record type for next population ARR/ RR ARR/ MRR/ Amount/ Month Amount.
decisions.name: Rule_CRT_Check_RT
decisions.label: *Rule(CRT)* - Check RT

decisions.description: Check if the Opportunity's Stage was changed
decisions.name: Rule_CS_Cross_Sale
decisions.label: *Rule (CS)*- Cross Sale?

decisions.name: Rule_CUPO_Client_Uses_Purchase_Order_PO_and_ISNEW
decisions.label: *Rule (CUPO)* - Client Uses Purchase Order (PO) and ISNEW?

rules.name: Last_Month_Payment_Change_or_ISNEW
rules.label: Last Month Payment Change or ISNEW

decisions.name: Rule_OCPC_Opp_CL_and_Primary_Contact_empty
decisions.label: *Rule (OCPC)* - Opp CL and Primary Contact empty?

rules.name: Opp_CL_and_Primary_Contact_empty
rules.label: Opp CL and Primary Contact empty

rules.name: Close_Won_Quote_not_Sumbitted
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2) AND 3 AND (4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10 OR 11 OR 12)
rules.label: Close Won/Quote not Sumbitted

rules.name: RT_Rank_Ranger_and_Cycle_price_is_not_blank
rules.label: RT = Rank Ranger and Cycle price is not blank

decisions.description: Set Opportunity Name MIS-7609 Remove Product Sold
decisions.name: Rule_SON_Set_Opportunity_Name
decisions.label: *Rule(SON)* - Set Opportunity Name

decisions.description: Update 'Stage Update Date' Field on Opportunity when Stage is changed
decisions.name: Rule_SUD_Update_Stage_Update_Date_Field_on_Opportunity
decisions.label: *Rule(SUD)* - Update 'Stage Update Date' Field on Opportunity

decisions.description: MIS-7442 - T2T tag on opp- check if the account is NT2t at the completion of the meeting and update the NT2T field
decisions.name: Update_NT2T
decisions.label: Update NT2T

Flow.description:
MIS-8338 - Replaced sorting of line items to be sorted by Id MIS-8255 - Moved Sub Motion update to after-save MIS-8186 - Removed Manager fields updates MIS-8017 Lean MEDDPICC Displayed on Pipeline Inspector MIS-7769 - Added defaults to ARR, Cycle Price, Cycle Price (Local) MIS-7858 - Added Adjusted ARR Timestamp handling MIS-7609 Remove Product Sold + add opp name RT Acquired Company MIS-7517 - Removed Opportunity Product Tracking population MIS-7442 - update NT2T MIS-7359 - Update create sub motion field MIS-7271 Add Product Tracking Names To CW Opportunity Email MIS-7241 - Update First Commit Date MIS-5956 - Is a PO Required Logic MIS-5742 - PO and Portal MIS-5588 - SW_Forecasting_Status_First_Value__c MIS-4985 - Populate CSM & CSM Manager Emails MIS-4831 - API update MIS-4513 MIS-4500 MIS-1893 Fixes Last - MIS-4112 MIS-4201 MIS-4247 MIS-4162 MIS-3658
MIS-6901

formulas.name: fr_Amount
formulas.expression: {!$Record.Cycle_Price__c} / Case ( {!$Record.Cycle__c} , "3 Years",36, "2 Years",24, "18 Months",18, "9 Months",9, "16 Months",16, "15 Months",15, "14 Months",14, "25 Months",25, "26 Months",26, "Monthly",1, "Annually",12, "Quarterly",3, "Semi-Annual",6, 1)

formulas.name: fr_Amount_MonthlyAmmount_for_RR
formulas.expression: {!$Record.Cycle_Price__c} / Case ( {!$Record.Cycle__c} , "3 Years",36, "2 Years",24, "18 Months",18, "9 Months",9, "16 Months",16, "15 Months",15, "14 Months",14, "25 Months",25, "26 Months",26, "Monthly",1, "Annually",12, "Quarterly",3, "Semi-Annual",6, 1)

formulas.name: fr_MonthlyAmount
formulas.expression: {!$Record.Cycle_Price__c} / Case ( {!$Record.Cycle__c} , "3 Years",36, "2 Years",24, "18 Months",18, "9 Months",9, "16 Months",16, "15 Months",15, "14 Months",14, "25 Months",25, "Monthly",1, "Annually",12, "Quarterly",3, "Semi-Annual",6, 1)

formulas.name: fr_OppName
formulas.expression: IF({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Wolves', IF(NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!$Record.Type} , "Strategic Partnership")), LEFT( {!$Record.Wolves_App_Name__c} +" - "+ TEXT({!$Record.Type})+" - "+ TEXT({!$Record.Wolves_Platform__c} ),100), LEFT( {!$Record.Account.Name} +" - "+ TEXT({!$Record.Type})+" - "+ TEXT( {!$Record.SBD_Type__c} ),100)) , LEFT(({!$Record.Account.Name} + ' - ' + TEXT({!$Record.Type}) + ' - ' + {!Get_Product_Tracking_Line_Items.Product2.Name} + ' ' + {!$Record.Plan_Details__c}),100))

formulas.name: fr_renewal_reopen_forecastStatus
formulas.expression: IF( AND( text({!$Record.StageName}) <> 'Closed Won', text({!$Record__Prior.StageName}) = 'Closed Lost' ), "25% - Confirmed Out", IF( AND( text({!$Record.StageName}) <> 'Closed Lost', text({!$Record__Prior.StageName}) = 'Closed Won' ), "80% - Confirmed In", NULL ) )

formulas.name: fr_Renewal_SW_forecast_status
formulas.expression: IF( and({!$Record.RecordType.Name} = 'Renewal', ischanged({!$Record.Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c})), IF( OR( ispickval({!$Record.Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c}, '25% - Confirmed Out'), ispickval({!$Record.Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c}, '40% - Projected Out') ), "Pipeline", IF( ispickval({!$Record.Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c}, '60% - Projected In'), "Best Case", IF( ispickval({!$Record.Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c}, '80% - Confirmed In'), "Commit", IF( ispickval({!$Record.Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c}, 'Closed'), "Closed", IF( ispickval({!$Record.Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c}, 'Omitted'), "Omitted", Null ) ) ) ) ), NULL )

Flow.interviewLabel: Opportunity - Record Triggered Flow - Before Save {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Opportunity - Record Triggered Flow - Before Save

recordUpdates.name: CARR_Update_RR_ARR_for_USD
recordUpdates.label: CARR - Update RR ARR for USD

recordUpdates.name: CARRR_Update_RR_ARR_for_not_USD
recordUpdates.label: CARRR - Update RR ARR for not USD

recordUpdates.description: Update MRR for Rank Ranger Opportunity when cycle price is changed and currency <> USD( for monthly cycle only )
recordUpdates.name: CPC_Update_MRR_for_currency_not_equal_USD
recordUpdates.label: CPC - Update MRR for currency <> USD

recordUpdates.description: Update MRR for Rank Ranger Opportunity when cycle price is changed ( for monthly cycle only )
recordUpdates.name: CPC_Update_MRR_for_USD
recordUpdates.label: CPC - Update MRR for USD

recordUpdates.name: Get_Assigned_CSM_Name_from_Account
recordUpdates.label: Get Assigned CSM Name from Account

recordUpdates.name: LMPC_Update_Opp_Last_Month_Payment
recordUpdates.label: LMPC - Update Opp Last Month Payment

recordUpdates.name: ME_Update_Meeting_Created_By_Manager_and_Related_Meeting_Created_By_emails
recordUpdates.label: ME - Update Meeting Created By Manager and Related Meeting Created By emails

recordUpdates.name: PCN_Update_Cadence_Name_and_Last_Step_Number
recordUpdates.label: PCN - Update Cadence Name and Last Step Number

recordUpdates.name: QNS_Update_Quote_Not_Submitted_Timestamp
recordUpdates.label: QNS - Update Quote Not Submitted Timestamp

recordUpdates.name: SA_Set_Monthly_Amount_Amount_New_ARR
recordUpdates.label: SA - Set Monthly Amount/ Amount /New ARR

recordUpdates.name: SUD_Update_Stage_Update_Date_Field_on_Opportunity
recordUpdates.label: SUD - Update 'Stage Update Date' Field on Opportunity

value.stringValue: Yes, but we don't have the number yet
